message:
fix: warning_events card guideline compliance (skeleton, isRefreshing) (#3170)

- Replace raw Skeleton elements with CardSkeleton component (G9)
- Add isRefreshing to useCardLoadingState for refresh animation (G10)
- Remove unused Skeleton import

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
